articles.title: DeepSeek V4 Pro at 1.6T Parameters Runs on Mac Studio — IQ2XXS Quantization Makes Local Inference Possible
articles.summary: IQ2XXS quantization enables DeepSeek V4 Pro at 1.6 trillion parameters to run on a Mac Studio M3 Ultra 512GB, demonstrating that Apple's unified memory architecture makes local frontier inference viable.

articles.title: KV Cache Architecture — Memento Research Confirms Semantic Value Beyond Computational Optimization
articles.summary: Memento research establishes KV cache state as semantically important to model performance, suggesting hardware architectures should prioritize persistent cache storage as a first-class design criterion.

articles.title: Gemma 4 E2B on Apple Silicon — MLX Optimization Shows What Unified Memory Enables for On-Device AI
articles.summary: Gemma 4 E2B at 40 tokens per second on iPhone 17 Pro validates Apple Silicon's unified memory architecture as the current leader for on-device AI inference on consumer mobile hardware.
